name: Lucky Pikinini - IMS Death Squad
short_description: IMS Death Squad is A Third-Person Story-Telling Game with a 4-Chapter Story Campaign, Set During The Events Of Super Incursion. IMS SGT David Grimmes Tries To Save Himself And His Team As Their Commander Has To Kill Them All, As A Requirement To Transition Into The Enemy Side.
detailed_description:
Name: IMS Death Squad, Engine: Unreal Engine 4, Development Time: 1 Year ( 2022 ), Scale: Medium Scale.

STORY:

IMS Death Squad is A Third-Person Story-Telling Game with a 4-Chapter Story Campaign. Its Story Takes place at the same time (2040) and same place (Gemstone Island - Advanced City) as the Events of the Original Super Incursion. This Time You take control of IMS SERGEANT David Grimmes who is leader of IMS Death Squad team and brother of Marcelene Grimmes of the Original Super Incursion, 3 special forces teams are sent out to Advanced City to carry out Operation: Winter Strike by Incursion Military Service (IMS) and Gemstone Communist People's Ministry of Defense They are Specialized Force, Death Squad & Intelligence Corp. At The Start Of Operation: Winter Strike SERGEANT Grimmes Is alerted by one of his teammates that the whole Death Squad team is in danger, their superior officer COLONEL Sebastian Garrett has defected to the Con-Federation of Global Terrorism (CGT) and as part of his entry into the enemy side, He has been instructed by CGT High Ranking Senior Officer MAJOR Nickolai Patrikov, To give out Important sensitive IMS information, murder His entire team (Death Squad) and members of other teams to help sabotage Operation: Winter Strike as his requirements to be fully admitted into the Con-Federation of Global Terrorism, If he succeeds he will become CGT MAJOR 2nd Class, Be granted Lightning powers by CGT SUPREME GENERAL John Voorhies and be trained in sword fighting and martial arts. Now COLONEL Sebastian Garrett is working together with the CGT to sabotage Operation: Winter Strike and kill its participants.

GAMEPLAY:

IMS Death Squad is a shoot'em up action game, where the player has 2 rifles, a pistol and grenades, has to fight off enemies, solve puzzles and loot the world to survive. You start off with the G36C, UMP and USP45 as your primary weapons. The Player has to take cover, sprint away or temporary hide from enemies to regenerate health during gunfights. The environment is overgrown and is explorable with pickups to find, there are text logs explaining background story, medikits, ammo, pipebombs, molotovs, money and more to be found. Exploration is part of the gameplay loop and you have to explore to find resources to help you survive.

VEHICLE GAMEPLAY:

In IMS Death Squad SGT David Grimes will drive IMS Military Equipment from one point to another, This Military Equipment includes Quad Bikes.

ADDITIONAL FEATURES:

After Completing the game you can replay it in NEW GAME + Mode, You can use PERMA-DEATH MODE to increase the challenge and beating the game with this mode enabled, unlocks a golden star in the main menu. Tutorials, Aim Assist, Invert Mouse can be enabled and disabled in game settings.

IMS Death Squad has a beautiful but very dangerous world, where you have to save yourself and your teammates with your superior officer trying to kill you and prevent you from carrying out your Operation.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Turkish, Korean
*languages with full audio support
